children.heading: Certain individuals prohibited from obtaining access
children.label: a Certain individuals prohibited from obtaining access
children.text: No national of a country designated by the Secretary of State under as a government supporting acts of international terrorism shall be permitted access to the United States to carry out an inspection activity under the Additional Protocol or a related safeguards agreement.section 2371 of this title

children.heading: Presence of United States Government personnel
children.label: b Presence of United States Government personnel
children.text: IAEA inspectors shall be accompanied at all times by United States Government personnel when inspecting sites, locations, facilities, or activities in the United States under the Additional Protocol.

children.heading: Vulnerability and related assessments
children.label: c Vulnerability and related assessments
children.text: The President shall conduct vulnerability, counterintelligence, and related assessments not less than every 5 years to ensure that information of direct national security significance remains protected at all sites, locations, facilities, and activities in the United States that are subject to IAEA inspection under the Additional Protocol.
